framing: Quantile regression (P10/P50/P90) within the $100K+ cohort. The previous point-estimate framing was killed because the cohort variance is dominated by unobserved factors — no point estimator can exceed a ceiling of R² ≈ 0.10. The quantile output is useful where the point estimate is not: it tells a caller the realistic income range for their profile.
data_prep_caveat: Training cohort is double-filtered by notebook 1: Census rows with INCTOT >= 100K inner-joined against BLS cells where A_MEAN >= 100K. A future gap should re-prep using the full Census dataset with a binary >= $100K classifier.
